name: LibInvent
description: Given a set of smiles strings of scaffolds, perform decoration to generate molecules which fit the scaffolds. Generate virtual chemical libraries for lead optimization in a broad range of scenarios.
capabilities: Given a set of smiles strings of scaffolds, perform decoration to generate molecules which fit the scaffolds
Generate virtual chemical libraries for lead optimization in a broad range of scenarios

scaffold_smiles.description: SMILES string of the scaffold with decoration points marked

num_molecules.description: Number of decorated molecules to generate
